# Flossworks – Stitch & Track

> An offline-first Android app (phones + tablets) for cross-stitch. Create patterns
> from your photos, import existing chart PDFs (including Pattern Keeper–style charts),
> organize projects, and track every stitch to the finish. Free to download with a
> 30-day trial; viewing and stitch-tracking are free forever; a one-time purchase
> unlocks creating/importing/exporting. No subscription. Made by Flossworks
> Cross-Stitch LLC.

## Create
- Turn any photo or image into a cross-stitch chart using real DMC thread colors, with automatic color reduction and anti-"confetti" cleanup.
- Choose your Aida/fabric count (12–32 ct) and chart size before generating.
- Draw your own pattern from a blank grid.

## Import
- Import chart PDFs, including Pattern Keeper–style charts, with the original symbols preserved.
- Restore your stitched progress from a Pattern Keeper ".pk_progress" backup — pick up exactly where you left off.
- Import/restore a ".flossworks" backup (a full project: chart + progress + history).

## Edit
- Adjust a generated chart or draw a custom one: paint, replace colors, set a border.
- "Isolate" a color with a glowing halo to find stray stitches fast.

## Track (free, forever)
- Mark stitches, with a mini-map, pan/zoom, live per-color remaining counts, and a focus mode. The screen stays on while you stitch.
- Sessions are timed; "total today" and per-color progress update as you go.

## Stats & motivation (free)
- Lifetime totals (survive deletes/reinstalls), daily history, current/longest streaks, and a finish-by estimate.
- Optional celebrations for milestones, finished colors, personal bests, and a weekly recap.

## Export & sell
- Export print-ready PDFs (full-color and black-and-white) with a legend and a built-in beginner guide.
- Save to a folder or zip (Drive/OneDrive/local), or share via the Android share sheet.
- Optional one-time commercial unlock: brand exported PDFs with your name/logo, generate Etsy-style listing images, and a license to sell patterns you create. (Imported third-party charts can't be re-shared/exported.)

## Pricing
- Free to download. 30-day free trial of all features. After that, a one-time purchase unlocks create/import/export; viewing and tracking stay free. A separate one-time commercial unlock adds branding + selling. No subscription.

## Privacy & platform
- Android 8.0+; phones and tablets. No account, no sign-up.
- Works offline; the only network use is Google Play (optional purchases and app updates), handled by Google.
- Your images, patterns, and progress stay on your device. The app collects and uploads no personal data.

## Links
- Home: https://flossworkscross-stitch.com/
- Get it on Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.caybin.crossstitchstudio
- Privacy Policy: https://flossworkscross-stitch.com/privacy
- Support: https://flossworkscross-stitch.com/support
